---
id: unassign
title: "Unassign a shared translation memory from the project"
description: "Removes the assignment between the project and the shared translation memory. The shared TM and its entries remain intact for other projects."
sidebar_label: "Unassign a shared translation memory from the project"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api//tolgee-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Unassign a shared translation memory from the project"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v2/projects/{projectId}/translation-memories/{translationMemoryId}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes the assignment between the project and the shared translation memory. The shared TM and its entries remain intact for other projects.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
